intrinsic_gain_system.description: After eating a corpse, the game picks one possible intrinsic at random from those the monster can convey, then rolls to see if you get it.

POISON_RES.exception: Killer bee and scorpion: 75% chance to use chance=1 instead of 15

intrinsic_gain_system.gain_formula: if (ptr->mlevel <= rn2(chance)) return; // failed. So P(gain) = min(mlevel, chance) / chance for mlevel < chance, else guaranteed.
intrinsic_gain_system.selection: If monster conveys multiple intrinsics, one is chosen uniformly at random (reservoir sampling). Strength from giants counted as an extra candidate.
intrinsic_gain_system.strength_from_giants: Treated as an intrinsic candidate. If it's the only one, 50% chance of being skipped entirely. Uses gainstr().

cprefx_effects.description: Effects that happen when you START eating the corpse.

petrifying_corpses.effect: Instant death by stoning unless Stone_resistance or can polymorph into stone golem.

dogs_and_cats.effect: Aggravate monster intrinsic granted (permanent). No penalty for cavemen/orcs.

riders.effect: Instantly fatal. Corpse revives. Life-saving required to survive.

green_slime.effect: Sliming begins (10 turns) unless already slimed, unchanging, or slimeproof.

cannibalism.condition: Eating own race or polymorphed species (not cavemen/orcs).

cpostfx_effects.description: Effects that happen AFTER completely eating the corpse.

newt.effect: 2/3 chance (or if energy <= 2/3 max): gain rnd(3) energy. 1/3 chance to increase max energy by 1.

nurse.effect: Full HP heal, cure blindness. Also checks for intrinsic conveyance (poison resistance).

stalker.effect: If not already invisible: gain temporary invisibility (50-149 turns) and see_invisible. OR permanent invisibility + see_invisible if you have the intrinsic already.

bat_and_giant_bat.effect: Stun for 30 turns (bat) or 60 turns (giant bat, includes yellow_light fallthrough).

mimics.effect: Forces you to mimic a pile of gold (or orange if hallucinating) for duration. Cannot ride.

quantum_mechanic.effect: Toggles intrinsic speed. If fast, become slow. If slow, become fast.

lizard.effect: Reduce stun to 2 turns max, reduce confusion to 2 turns max.

mind_flayer.effect: 50% chance to gain +1 INT (if below max). If no INT gain, falls through to intrinsic check (telepathy possible).

hallucination_inducers.condition: Monster has AD_STUN or AD_HALU attack, or is violet fungus.

corpse_freshness.tainted_threshold: rotted > 5: tainted, causes food poisoning (rn1(10,10) turns) unless Sick_resistance
corpse_freshness.mildly_sick: rotted > 5, or (rotted > 3 and 80% chance): lose rnd(8) HP
corpse_freshness.rotten_food_chance: If not tainted/poisonous/acidic and (orotten flag set or 1/7 chance): rotten food effects (confusion, blindness, or fainting)

poisonous_corpses.description: Determined by poisonous() macro on the monster's permonst data. 80% chance of triggering poison effect.
poisonous_corpses.effect_without_resistance: Lose rnd(4) STR, lose rnd(15) HP.

acidic_corpses.description: Determined by acidic() macro on monster data. Always triggers (no probability roll).
acidic_corpses.effect_without_resistance: Lose rnd(15) HP from stomach acid.
acidic_corpses.cure_stoning: Acidic corpses also cure stoning if eaten while turning to stone (same as lizard).

tin_varieties.notes: Causes vomiting (rn1(15,10) turns). Always rotten if cursed.
Health food. 1/7 chance of going rotten if not blessed.

spinach_tin.effect: Grants strength increase (gainstr). Described as feeling like Popeye.

tin_effects.booby_trapped: otrapped flag or (cursed and not homemade and 1/8 chance): explodes.
tin_effects.corpse_effects_apply: Eating tinned monster meat applies both cprefx and cpostfx, so intrinsics can be gained.
tin_effects.nonrotting_tins: Lizard and lichen tins are always at least homemade quality (never rotten).

nonrotting_food.description: Lembas wafer and cram ration do not rot. However, if cursed, they behave as rotten.
